title: RiptideDisabler
description: A plugin that disables riptide tridents when you're in PVP fights.
body:
# RiptideDisabler
### Tired of people running away with Riptide in fights?
This plugin completely disables the Riptide enchantment when you're in combat! ❌
## Features 📝
- **Combat Riptide Lock:** Automatically disables Riptide when you are hit by another player.  
- **Configurable Cooldown:** Set the duration you remain in combat and cannot use Riptide. 
- **Only during Combat:** Riptide tridents work normally outside of PVP fights.
- **Lightweight and easy to configure.**  

Have fun fighting on your server without Riptide Tridents!
